title: 10 best herbal tinctures for dark lips
description: Kansas coneflower tinctures helps with dark lips because of its natural ability to soothe and calm irritated skin. The anti-inflammatory properties in Echinacea, also known as Kansas coneflower, help to reduce redness and hyperpigmentation, resulting in a more even-toned lip appearance. Additionally, the antioxidant-rich formula protects the lips from environmental stressors and free radicals that can cause darkening of the skin.
